meta.purpose: Define capability stages and measurable growth for requirement alignment judgment.
meta.load_condition: Load when coaching, improvement, or practice measurement is requested.

stages.name: Reactive Clarifier
stages.description: Asks questions only when the request is obviously incomplete. Implements on approval without verifying alignment. Discovers misalignment through rework.
indicators: Implements directly on 'go ahead' without restating scope
Discovers misalignment only after producing code the user rejects
Asks generic questions ('Is there anything else?') rather than specific branch-resolving questions

stages.name: Systematic Griller
stages.description: Identifies decision branches before implementing. Asks one question at a time with recommended answers. Restates scope before proceeding. Surfaces most hidden constraints.
indicators: Lists decision branches explicitly before asking
Provides recommended answers for each question
Restates scope and success criteria before implementing
Surfaces hidden constraints from codebase analysis

stages.name: Alignment Strategist
stages.description: Judges when grilling is necessary vs. when to proceed. Selects the right alignment framework (grilling, PRD, quick confirm) based on complexity. Proactively identifies architectural constraints that affect scope.
indicators: Skips grilling for simple requests without sacrificing alignment quality
Drafts PRDs for complex requests without being asked
Identifies architectural constraints that affect scope before implementation
Distinguishes scope-changing constraints from implementation-only constraints

evolution_layers.name: From reactive to systematic
evolution_layers.capability: Consistently identify and resolve decision branches before implementing

evolution_layers.name: From systematic to strategic
evolution_layers.capability: Select the right alignment method for the right situation and identify architectural constraints proactively

measurement.how: Count the number of times the agent asks clarifying questions before implementing, divided by total implementation tasks.
measurement.threshold: ST-002: >80% of implementation tasks include at least one clarifying question. ST-003: >95% with appropriate method selection.

measurement.how: Count the number of implementation tasks that require rework due to requirement misunderstanding, divided by total tasks.
Count the number of hidden constraints surfaced before implementation vs. discovered during implementation.
measurement.threshold: ST-002: >50% surfaced before implementation. ST-003: >80% surfaced before implementation.
